summary: This topic describes how to view the assigned salary template (contract) and its details for a specific employee.
steps: Scroll down to locate the 'Salary Template' section.
Click on the 'Salary Template' link or button to view the detailed information of the assigned contract.
important_notes: This view displays the *assigned salary template* or contract, not the processed monthly salary for any specific period.
While it is possible to add new contracts from this section, it is generally preferable to use the 'Assign Salary Template' option for better visibility of calculations and options.
questions: How can I check which salary contract is currently assigned to an employee?
Where can I see the details of an employee's current salary structure or template?
Is there a way to quickly verify if an employee has a contract assigned?
